author: maxine--futura
content: Plan: Add a just sync-lexicons recipe that fetches the latest lexicons from forecast-bio/atdata-lexicon and copies them to both lexicons/ (vendored) and src/atdata/lexicons/ (package). The atdata-lexicon repo has the same directory structure (lexicons/science/alt/dataset/*.json). Will use gh API or git archive to avoid cloning. Also need to push the manifests change upstream to atdata-lexicon.
